title: Avatar Component
content:
The Avatar component is a set of reusable UI elements for displaying user or entity avatars.

It is built using `@radix-ui/react-avatar` and provides a flexible and accessible way to render avatars.

## Exports

- **Avatar**
  The root component for the avatar. It wraps the `AvatarImage` and `AvatarFallback`.

  **Props:**
  Accepts all props from `AvatarPrimitive.Root`.

- **AvatarImage**
  Displays the avatar image.

  **Props:**
  Accepts all props from `AvatarPrimitive.Image`.

- **AvatarFallback**
  Displays a fallback content (e.g., initials or an icon) when the image cannot be loaded or is not available.

  **Props:**
  Accepts all props from `AvatarPrimitive.Fallback`.

## Usage

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@/components/ui/avatar';

function UserProfile() {
  return (
    <Avatar>
      <AvatarImage src="https://github.com/shadcn.png" alt="@shadcn" />
      <AvatarFallback>CN</AvatarFallback>
    </Avatar>
  );
}
```

This example shows how to render an avatar with an image source and a fallback text.

### Customization

Both `Avatar`, `AvatarImage`, and `AvatarFallback` accept a `className` prop for custom styling.

```tsx
<Avatar className="h-16 w-16">
  <AvatarImage src="https://example.com/avatar.jpg" />
  <AvatarFallback className="bg-blue-500 text-white">JD</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>
```
